name: pi-remote-agent
description_en: Secure remote agent bridge for pi — delegate tasks to another pi instance over Tailscale. Includes /ask-agent command and ask_remote_agent tool for LLM-driven delegation.
description_zh: Pi 的安全远程代理桥 — 通过 Tailscale 将任务委派到另一个 Pi 实例。包含 /ask-agent 命令和 ask_remote_agent 工具，用于 LLM 驱动的委派
